title: gratiola torreyi
intro: Gratiola torreyi, also known as Eastern Robin Run, is a perennial herb native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and characterized by its small, white, and purple flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Gratiola torreyi include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive problems and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be dried to make a powder for added convenience.
